tool_name: Pump System Curve & BEP Deviation — Hydraulic Power Loss & Cavitation Risk

inputs.name: Rated (BEP) Total Head (H_BEP)
inputs.uncertainty_source: ISO 21748:2017 §7.3 — Default Type B: ±5% for unclassified parameters

inputs.name: Fluid Density (ρ)
inputs.uncertainty_source: JCSS PMC Part 3 — Material density: CoV=0.01-0.03

inputs.name: NPSHr (Required Net Positive Suction Head)
inputs.uncertainty_source: ISO 21748:2017 §7.3 — Default Type B: ±5% for unclassified parameters

inputs.name: NPSHa (Available Net Positive Suction Head)
inputs.uncertainty_source: ISO 21748:2017 §7.3 — Default Type B: ±5% for unclassified parameters

formulas: Q_ratio = actual_flow_m3h / rated_flow_m3h   // [dimensionless] Flow Deviation Ratio Reference: HI 9.6.3-2017 §4.1
eta_act = rated_efficiency_pct * (1 - 0.3 * (1 - Q_ratio)^2)   // [%] Affinity-Law Corrected Efficiency Reference: ISO 9906:2012 Annex B — parabolic efficiency correction
P_hyd = (fluid_density_kg_m3 * 9.81 * actual_flow_m3h/3600 * rated_head_m) / 1000   // [kW] Actual Hydraulic Power Reference: API 610-12th Ed. §6.1.8
P_overload_pct = ((P_hyd / (eta_act/100)) - motor_power_kw) / motor_power_kw * 100   // [%] Power Overshoot (Overload Risk) Reference: HI 9.6.3-2017 §4.3 — motor overload threshold
npsh_margin = npsha_m / npshr_m   // [dimensionless] NPSH Margin Ratio Reference: HI 9.6.1-2012 — minimum margin = 1.1 for clear water
E_loss_kwh = (motor_power_kw - P_hyd/(eta_act/100)) * 8760   // [kWh/yr] Annual Hydraulic Energy Loss vs BEP Reference: ISO 50001:2018 energy baseline method

V1.error_msg: Operation below 50% BEP flow: recirculation risk — increase flow or install bypass

V2.error_msg: Operation above 120% BEP: cavitation and overload risk — throttle or trim impeller

V3.error_msg: NPSHa margin < 1.1× NPSHr: cavitation onset likely — lower suction lift or increase inlet pressure

smart_warnings.message: Severe left-of-BEP operation: axial thrust reversal and bearing fatigue risk per HI 9.6.3
Right-of-BEP runout: NPSH curve steep rise — verify NPSHa at this flow
NPSHa < NPSHr: cavitation active — impeller erosion will occur within 500 operating hours
Motor overload >5%: thermal trip risk — verify service factor or upsize motor
Operating efficiency <75% of BEP: energy waste exceeds ISO 50001 baseline threshold
Large pump at low BEP efficiency: consider hydraulic redesign or variable-speed drive

fmea.effect: Operation below 50% BEP flow: recirculation risk — increase flow or install bypass
fmea.control_measure: Input validation — automatic BLOCK on violation

fmea.effect: Operation above 120% BEP: cavitation and overload risk — throttle or trim impeller
fmea.control_measure: Input validation — automatic BLOCK on violation

fmea.effect: NPSHa margin < 1.1× NPSHr: cavitation onset likely — lower suction lift or increase inlet pressure
fmea.control_measure: Input validation — automatic BLOCK on violation

fmea.failureMode: Severe left-of-BEP operation: axial thrust reversal and bearing fatigue risk per HI 9.6.3
Right-of-BEP runout: NPSH curve steep rise — verify NPSHa at this flow
NPSHa < NPSHr: cavitation active — impeller erosion will occur within 500 operating hours
Motor overload >5%: thermal trip risk — verify service factor or upsize motor
Operating efficiency <75% of BEP: energy waste exceeds ISO 50001 baseline threshold
fmea.effect: Smart warning triggered when: eta_act_pct < rated_efficiency_pct * 0.75

fmea.failureMode: Large pump at low BEP efficiency: consider hydraulic redesign or variable-speed drive
fmea.effect: Smart warning triggered when: rated_efficiency_pct < 60 && motor_power_kw > 75
